docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BAEK, BRIAN 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-02-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-03-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-05-2002
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED APR-13-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAEK, BRIAN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT BAEK, BRIAN
DECLARATION OF COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAEK, BRIAN POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE DETAIL IN TEXT ..., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $21,632.67, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $444.75 DAMAGES, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $141.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,085.75, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $24718.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. THE FOLLOWING LEASED EQUIPMENT IS 1996 USED FREIGHTLINER, VIN # 1FUY3MCB5TP631653, WHICH EQUIPMENT HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $1200, PLTF. HAS REPOSSESSED THE SUBJECT SECURITY & IS CURRENTLY HOLDING IT FOR SALE. DEFT. WILL BE CREDITED WITH ANY NET PROCEEDS OF SALE PURSUANT TO THE CA. COMMERCIAL CODE.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-02-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
